APPEARANCES:
Frank Kim, Esq. (415.567.5700) for Plaintiff.
Alexander M. Kallis, Esq. (650.576.2878; alexanderkallis@gmail.com) for Defendant, Faafetai Faaleava via Zoom Video Conference.
Jody Struck, Esq. (510.763.2324; jstruck@htalaw.com) and Tracy Warner, Esq. (twarner@htalaw.com) for Defendant, First Samoian Congregational Church via Zoom Video Conference.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). Plaintiff's Counsel stated his client passed away and that he currently has no client while he is seeking a party to take over as personal representative for the Plaintiff. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT FIRST SAMOAN CONGREGATIONAL CHURCH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues is continued to January 18, 2023 at 9:30am, Law and Motion Dept.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Joanna Broadwell, CSR# 10959, (510.332.0512; broadwelljo@aol.com), Reported. =(302/RBU)
